title: Afrobeats in the Garden – Easter Special
venue: The Garden Vauxhall, South Lambeth Road
description:
Celebrate Easter Sunday at Afrobeats in the Garden, a vibrant Afrobeats party at The Garden Vauxhall. Enjoy the best Afrobeats, Amapiano and Afro-fusion from The PM and friends in a huge outdoor beer garden with food stalls, cocktails and great community vibes.

Limited free tickets at thegardenvauxhall.co.uk
